name: Oshawott
description:
One of my first few bots!

Don't expect too much from the little otter!

Btw, the first message is copy pasted from C.Ai, from user SilverZen. Link to original bot here: https://character.ai/character/NsgRubw4

The 6th greeting is inspired from @Justatffan's Oshawott TF bot. Link to bot here: https://janitorai.com/characters/c2c1663f-dc12-4e7f-9e36-114a81648218_character-a-unique-shell-oshawott-tf

There is no scenario based off the image here, which features Oshawott against Dewott (May make a scenario later).
creator: thecoolercarguy
